source_pr.title: statistics: reduce the log output
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: ref https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/55906

Problem Summary:

### What changed and how does it work?

After I tested it in the real cluster, The logs were a little overwhelming.

So I changed it to print logs only if it takes longer than the threshold(150ms).

The current test result, for 1k tables:
```log
tidb.log:[2024/11/06 19:17:14.008 +08:00] [INFO] [queue.go:337] ["DML changes processed"] [category=stats] [duration=4.609153ms]
tidb.log:[2024/11/06 19:19:14.003 +08:00] [INFO] [queue.go:315] ["Start to fetch DML changes of jobs"] [category=stats]
tidb.log:[2024/11/06 19:19:14.008 +08:00] [INFO] [queue.go:337] ["DML changes processed"] [category=stats] [duration=4.651311ms]
tidb.log:[2024/11/06 19:19:19.996 +08:00] [INFO] [refresher.go:187] ["No tables to analyze"] [category=stats] [sampled=]
tidb.log:[2024/11/06 19:21:14.003 +08:00] [INFO] [queue.go:315] ["Start to fetch DML changes of jobs"] [category=stats]
tidb.log:[2024/11/06 19:21:14.008 +08:00] [INFO] [queue.go:337] ["DML changes processed"] [category=stats] [duration=4.815927ms]
tidb.log:[2024/11/06 19:21:14.008 +08:00] [INFO] [queue.go:318] ["Start to refresh last analysis durations of jobs"] [category=stats]
tidb.log:[2024/11/06 19:21:14.009 +08:00] [INFO] [queue.go:645] ["Last analysis duration refreshed"] [category=stats] [duration=9.037µs]
tidb.log:[2024/11/06 19:21:14.009 +08:00] [INFO] [queue.go:321] ["Start to request must retry jobs"] [category=stats]
tidb.log:[2024/11/06 19:21:14.010 +08:00] [INFO] [queue.go:612] ["Must retry jobs requeued"] [category=stats] [duration=3.536µs]
tidb.log:[2024/11/06 19:23:14.003 +08:00] [INFO] [queue.go:315] ["Start to fetch DML changes of jobs"] [category=stats]
tidb.log:[2024/11/06 19:23:14.009 +08:00] [INFO] [queue.go:337] ["DML changes processed"] [category=stats] [duration=4.902583ms]
tidb.log:[2024/11/06 19:24:22.996 +08:00] [INFO] [refresher.go:187] ["No tables to analyze"] [category=stats] [sampled=]
tidb.log:[2024/11/06 19:25:14.003 +08:00] [INFO] [queue.go:315] ["Start to fetch DML changes of jobs"] [category=stats]
tidb.log:[2024/11/06 19:25:14.008 +08:00] [INFO] [queue.go:337] ["DML changes processed"] [category=stats] [duration=4.587099ms]
tidb.log:[2024/11/06 19:26:14.003 +08:00] [INFO] [queue.go:321] ["Start to request must retry jobs"] [category=stats]
tidb.log:[2024/11/06 19:26:14.004 +08:00] [INFO] [queue.go:612] ["Must retry jobs requeued"] [category=stats] [duration=6.005µs]
```
The current test result, for 1m tables:
```log
tidb.log:[2024/11/06 19:28:54.954 +08:00] [INFO] [queue.go:337] ["DML changes processed"] [category=stats] [duration=116.376734ms]
tidb.log:[2024/11/06 19:28:54.955 +08:00] [INFO] [queue.go:318] ["Start to refresh last analysis durations of jobs"] [category=stats]
tidb.log:[2024/11/06 19:28:54.955 +08:00] [INFO] [queue.go:645] ["Last analysis duration refreshed"] [category=stats] [duration=6.274µs]
tidb.log:[2024/11/06 19:28:54.955 +08:00] [INFO] [queue.go:321] ["Start to request must retry jobs"] [category=stats]
tidb.log:[2024/11/06 19:28:54.956 +08:00] [INFO] [queue.go:612] ["Must retry jobs requeued"] [category=stats] [duration=8.521µs]
tidb.log:[2024/11/06 19:29:39.491 +08:00] [INFO] [refresher.go:187] ["No tables to analyze"] [category=stats] [sampled=]
tidb.log:[2024/11/06 19:30:54.837 +08:00] [INFO] [queue.go:315] ["Start to fetch DML changes of jobs"] [category=stats]
tidb.log:[2024/11/06 19:30:54.958 +08:00] [INFO] [queue.go:337] ["DML changes processed"] [category=stats] [duration=119.915ms]
tidb.log:[2024/11/06 19:32:54.837 +08:00] [INFO] [queue.go:315] ["Start to fetch DML changes of jobs"] [category=stats]
tidb.log:[2024/11/06 19:32:54.960 +08:00] [INFO] [queue.go:337] ["DML changes processed"] [category=stats] [duration=121.760741ms]
tidb.log:[2024/11/06 19:33:54.837 +08:00] [INFO] [queue.go:321] ["Start to request must retry jobs"] [category=stats]
tidb.log:[2024/11/06 19:33:54.838 +08:00] [INFO] [queue.go:612] ["Must retry jobs requeued"] [category=stats] [duration=7.207µs]
```

Also, I stabilized one flaky test in this PR.
